assignment.title: Careers in Forensic Science Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Your final assignment for Forensic Science 25 is to examine some of the possible career options involving Forensics.  You will summarize your research in your assignment below.

Complete the following assignment to explore these careers and the education you would need to have to pursue them. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Careers in Forensic Science Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
